zh.lifeSummary: 當Christina Mowbray於1305年出生在英國越可爾吉可林頓時，她的父親John de Mowbray 2nd Baron Mowbray19歲，母親Baroness Aline de Braose19歲。她於1334年6月30日之前與William de Plumpton結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1362年12月25日在英國越可爾普倫普頓 在 斯波福斯享年57歲。

nameMeanings.name: Mowbray
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern; of Norman origin): habitational name from Montbray (Manche). Robert de Mowbray was Earl of Northumbria 1086–95, but was later imprisoned and deposed for rebelling against William II.

variants.name: Mulberry
meanings: English (Middlesex and Cambridgeshire): variant of   Mowbray  .
Irish (Derry): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Maoilbhearaigh ‘descendant of the devotee of (Saint) Bearach’.

variants.name: Mayberry
meanings: English: most probably an altered form of   Mowbray  . It is also found as   Maybury  , which has the form of an English habitational name. There is a place near Woking in Surrey so called; however, this is not recorded until 1885 and is probably derived from the surname. In England this surname is found mainly in the West Midlands; it has also spread into Wales. In Ireland this form is common in Ulster; MacLysaght records that it was taken there from England in the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Christina
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Simplified form of Latin Christiana, feminine form of Christianus ( see Christian ), or a Latinized form of Middle English Christin ‘Christian’ (Old English christen, from Latin).

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Christina Mowbray was born in 1305, in Kirklington, Yorkshire, England, her father, John de Mowbray 2nd Baron Mowbray, was 19 and her mother, Baroness Aline de Braose, was 19. She married William de Plumpton before 30 June 1334. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 25 December 1362, in Plumpton in Spofforth, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 57.

Elle a épousé William de Plumpton avant 30 juin 1334. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 25 décembre 1362, à Plumpton in Spofforth, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 57 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Christina Mowbray(이)가 1305년 영국 요르크실르 커크링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Mowbray 2nd Baron Mowbray(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Baroness Aline de Braose(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1334년 6월 30일 이전 William de Plumpton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1362년 12월 25일 영국 요르크실르 플럼프턴 인 스포포스에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Christina Mowbray nasceu em 1305, em Kirklington, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Mowbray 2nd Baron Mowbray, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Baroness Aline de Braose, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com William de Plumpton antes 30 de junho de 1334. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Christina Mowbray родилась в 1305 г. в местности кирклингтон, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John de Mowbray 2nd Baron Mowbray было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Baroness Aline de Braose, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Plumpton перед 30 июнь 1334 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 25 декабря 1362 г. в местности плумптон ин споффорт, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 57 лет.
